title: Verify Final Cancellation after Rejecting Incentive
description: Test that a user who rejects the incentive offer can complete the cancellation process, sees the feedback form, and loses access immediately.
preconditions: User is in an active trial and part of the Trial Corner cohort.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is enabled in the backend.

steps.description: 1. Follow steps 1-4 from TC002 to reach the 'Incentive' pop-up.
2. Click the secondary action to reject the offer (e.g., 'Cancel Anyway').
5. Verify the trial is immediately cancelled and the user loses access to premium content.
6. Verify the Trial Corner and homepage widget update to the 'Cancelled' state.

expected_result: The user's trial is cancelled, access is revoked, and UI updates to 'Cancelled'. 'cancel-clicked', 'feedback-popup-viewed', and 'feedback-submitted' events are triggered.
